pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires creating this directory.
Task description explicitly requires appending to this CSV path.

privileged_info_summary: I have completed the PI audit for the create_timeline_state_machine task and discovered that the task is defective. The critical PowerShell scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) specified in the task hooks are missing from the environment. This breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read a task_result.json output file that will never be generated. The required output directory and expected CSV file path match the explicit instructions in the prompt description.
